name: Yuri Honjou
description: Main protagonist of the series. One day, she founds herself in a weird world where masked people try to kill her. After realizing that her brother is in the same world as her, she is determined to stay alive and meet her brother.

name: I-Jin Yu
description: As the only survivor of a plane crash, Ijin became a mercenary in order to survive. 10 years later, he returned to his home country where his family was. As a former mercenary, he attends school and is currently a senior.

name: Ichirou Inuyashiki
description: __Height:__ 167 cm At first glance, Ichirou is a timid man who rarely likes to speak out, which is evident in the way that his family treats him. He retreats into cowardice and melancholy when behaviors such as hatred, selfishness, rudeness or bullying come into his way. His introversion, however, is in conflict with his need to help and support all those around him. ~! When he receives his powers he becomes a bit braver than originally perceived at the beginning of the story. !~ Ichirou is a mi

name: Killer Bee
description: Killer Bee is a muscle-bound shinobi from Kumogakure and the Jinchūriki of the [Eight-Tailed Beast](https://anilist.co/character/55293). It is hinted he comes from the Yotsuki clan. He appears to dislike light. He also carries seven swords and has a brother who is the [Raikage](https://anilist.co/character/22894). She is also quite manipulative. In Part II, she's depicted as mischievous and teasing, as she clearly mocked the Viole impostor and repeatedly called him "Pig". name: Kenji Harima
description: __Height:__ 180 cm (5'11") Kenji Harima is the male protagonist, an ex-delinquent who loves Tenma. Although he does not practice any specific martial arts style, few people are able to match him in hand-to-hand combat. He has the ability to communicate with animals, and possesses a wide variety of strange and exotic pets which he named after European monarchs. He has a little brother, Shuuji, who likes Yakumo. Harima struggles often to confess to Tenma, though he knows she has absolutely no feel

name: Chiyo Mihama
description: Chiyo Mihama , usually called Chiyo-chan, is a child prodigy, having skipped five grades to 10th grade (first year in Japanese high school) at the start of the series yet is still top of the class. Such grade-skipping would be unthinkable in Japan, and the series humorously explores its potential consequences. The other characters find Chiyo amazingly cute, but sometimes take advantage of both her youthfulness and her scholastic abilities. Her diminutive stature leads to her having a lack of con
mediaTitles: Azumanga Daioh: The Very Short Movie

name: Killy
description: Killy is the main character who is on the unenviable task to find a human with the Net Terminal Gene within the Megastructure to access the Netsphere. He is equipped with a Gravitational Beam Emitter (GBE), a petite but awesome weapon capable of creating holes miles long in the Megastructure. He is soon joined by Cibo in his quest. name: Rose
description: Leader of the Lingle Kingdom Lifesaving Team. She is a healing magician, but her combat abilities are very high, and she once served as a battalion commander of the Knights. She forces Usato, her healing magician, to join the lifesaving group and trains him as her right-hand man.

name: Shampoo
description: Shampoo is a Chinese Amazon from Joketsuzoku. She is one of the main three fiancées of [Ranma Saotome.](https://anilist.co/character/668/Ranma-Saotome) She is manipulative. She has repeatedly shown as devious and strategic as well as not being above scheming, play-acting, or completely ruthless behavior to advance her position towards the object of her attention. However, Shampoo does seem to enjoy having fun from the trouble she causes, particularly if it means she can get close to Ranma as a r

name: Kohaku
description: The older of the two twin maids in the Tohno mansion, Kohaku, along with Hisui, is a childhood friend of Shiki. She wears a Japanese kimono and is always seen to be smiling and cheerful, being especially gifted with medicine. Her name, Kohaku, is the Japanese word for amber, referring to her eye color. ~!She hides her tragic past behind a cheerful face and Hisui's cold demeanor. Like Hisui, Kohaku is a Synchronizer, a person that can give someone life energy through exchange of body fluids.!~ ~!

name: Akira Ogata
description: Akira was passionate about anime and manga in her childhood but due to her mother and classmates' ill views towards this hobby she had to leave her love for manga and anime. Few years later, when she was reunited with some of her classmates that were into anime, she started hanging out with them and discovered her love of anime and manga again, with this she also started cosplaying different characters with her friends to show them her gratitude.

description: __Nationality:__ American __Hobbies:__ Dueling Ringo Roadagain is a gunslinger at the service of Funny Valentine who traps Gyro, Johnny and Hot Pants at the beginning of the 4th Stage, near Cannon City, to seize the Saint's Corpse's parts. He is a Stand User and uses his time-rewinding Mandom during gun fights to get the upper hand. Ringo is obsessed with bettering himself through duels. name: Haida
description: Haida is an office worker that works alongside Retsuko in the accounting office and has a massive crush on her. ~!His parents are rather wealthy, so his apartment is actually paid for by them, and therefore he doesn't need to bother paying the rent.!~

name: Asuka Ootorii
description: Known as "Rapture," Asuka is the former leader of the Magical Five, the group of five magical girls that saved humanity from the beasts of the Netherworld three years ago. Due to the scars that the life on the battlefield left on her, she vows to never become a magical girl again and to live a peaceful life away from war.

name: Iruka Umino
description: __Height:__ 5'8" Iruka Umino is an instructor at the Ninja Academy, characterized by the distinctive scar across his face that he has had since childhood. The name "Umino Iruka" can be taken as "umi no iruka" ("sea dolphin"). Twelve to thirteen years ago, the Nine-Tailed Demon Fox attacked Konoha, killing many people. name: Kazuki Kazami
description: __Height:__ 150 cm Kazuki is [Yuuji](https://anilist.co/character/80891)'s elder sister as well as the one who taught him throughout the earlier periods of his life. Despite her delicate and diminutive body, she has brilliant intellect and excels in quick-witted judgement to the point that she has been labelled as a genius. name: Richeh
description: Richeh is a young witch in training and a disciple of Qifrey. She wants to keep her magic essentially "pure" and unchanged and resents having to do what others tell her to do. Richeh specializes in crystal magic, particularly in creating transparent crystal ribbons. She also excels at drawing small, intricate glyphs, and has been shown to be adept at connecting these together to form magical portal holes. She has a seemingly emotionless and childish personality. She avoids showing much emotion,

name: Diarmuid  Ua Duibhne
nativeName: ディルムッド・オディナ
description: __Height:__ 184 cm __Weight:__ 85 kg __Master:__ Kayneth Archibald El-Melloi In Fate/Zero ~!Lancer is the Servant of Kayneth Archibald El-Melloi during the 4th Holy Grail War. name: Kuroo Hazama
description: Black Jack is a medical mercenary, selling his skills to the highest bidder. He is a shadowy figure, with a black cloak, eerie black-and-white hair, a scar across his face and partially black skin. Black Jack cures patients indiscriminately, from common folk to presidents and yakuza leaders. To his VIP patients, he charges absurd sums. All this has given him a reputation for callousness and greed which he gleefully cultivates. However, to the reader it is clear that Black Jack actually is a good

name: Yue
description: Yue is one of two guardians of Clow Cards and judges candidates to become the next master of Clow Cards. Yue's appearance is that of a young man with long, silver braided hair and violet cat-like eyes (blue in the anime). He has a pair of angelic wings that he can use to fly. Yue has jurisdiction over wind and water—the elements "under him" which in part draw on him for their existence. He is a capable fighter who can raise powerful magical barriers, send deadly crystal shards at his adversaries
